story.soThat: cache, generation, S3 upload flow yönetebilleyim

acceptanceCriteria.ac: DocumentGeneratorService oluşturulmuş - Dependencies injection: CacheService, RetryService, AwsService, PdfAdapterFactory, ExcelAdapterFactory, I18nService
generate() Method implement edilmiş - Method signature: async generate(documentType: DocumentType, options: DocumentGeneratorOptions): Promise<GenerationResult>
Generation Flow implement edilmiş - Cache check → Adapter retrieval → Generation → S3 upload → Cache update
Enums oluşturulmuş - DocumentType (PDF, EXCEL), CacheStrategy (TEMPLATE_HASH, NO_CACHE)
Error Handling implement edilmiş - AdapterNotFoundException, TemplateNotFoundException, GenerationFailedException
Default Values implement edilmiş - Default cache TTL: 1 hour, default cache strategy: TEMPLATE_HASH, default ACL: public-read, S3 filename auto-generation, Content-Type auto-detection
Logging implement edilmiş - Generation time, cache hit/miss, file size, S3 upload success/failure, structured logging format

docs.doc: Complete AC specifications (AC-6.4.1 through AC-6.4.8). Service orchestration architecture, generation flow, error handling, default values, logging requirements.
Epic-level story breakdown and acceptance criteria. Main method signature, generation flow, enums, error handling, technical notes.
Service orchestration pattern, cache check → adapter retrieval → generation → S3 upload → cache update flow.
DocumentGeneratorService dependencies and responsibilities table. Inputs, outputs, dependencies.
Document generation flow diagram and detailed PDF/Excel generation flows. Retry mechanism flow.
Error codes and exception handling architecture. AdapterNotFoundException, TemplateNotFoundException, GenerationFailedException.
Module structure patterns, import organization (8-group order), API response format.
Arrange-Act-Assert pattern, testing standards, test coverage requirements.
PdfAdapterFactory ve ExcelAdapterFactory pattern, custom exceptions, example adapters, module structure.

file.reason: Factory for retrieving PDF adapters. Methods: getAdapter(templateName), getRegisteredTemplates(). Used by DocumentGeneratorService for PDF adapter retrieval.
Factory for retrieving Excel adapters. Methods: getAdapter(adapterName), getRegisteredAdapters(). Used by DocumentGeneratorService for Excel adapter retrieval.
Exception thrown when adapter not found. Used in DocumentGeneratorService when factory.getAdapter() fails.
Exception thrown when template file not found. Used in DocumentGeneratorService when adapter.generate() fails due to missing template.
Exception thrown when document generation fails. Used in DocumentGeneratorService for generation errors and S3 upload failures.

AWS S3 service for file upload. Method: uploadFile(buffer, key, mimeType). Used by DocumentGeneratorService for S3 upload. Note: S3Service has built-in retry logic, but DocumentGeneratorService should use RetryService wrapper (Story 6.6).
Example PDF adapter. Extends BasePdfAdapter, implements IPdfAdapter. Used for testing DocumentGeneratorService PDF generation flow.
Example Excel adapter. Extends BaseExcelAdapter, implements IExcelAdapter. Used for testing DocumentGeneratorService Excel generation flow.

constraints.constraint: Service Orchestration Pattern: DocumentGeneratorService orchestrates cache check → adapter retrieval → generation → S3 upload → cache update flow. Separation of concerns: CacheService, RetryService, AwsService are separate services.

Dependency Injection Pattern: NestJS dependency injection required. CacheService and RetryService should be injected as interfaces/placeholders (implemented in Story 6.5 and 6.6). Factory pattern for adapter retrieval.
Error Handling Pattern: Use custom exceptions from Story 6.3: AdapterNotFoundException, TemplateNotFoundException, GenerationFailedException. Context-aware error messages.
Caching Strategy: SHA-256 hash-based caching (Story 6.5). Cache key format: doc:{type}:{template}:{dataHash}. TTL support (default 1 hour). Cache strategies: TEMPLATE_HASH, NO_CACHE.
Retry Mechanism: Exponential backoff retry (Story 6.6). Max 3 attempts. S3 upload failures use RetryService wrapper.

Module Structure: DocumentGeneratorService at services/document-generator.service.ts. Enums at enums/document-type.enum.ts, enums/cache-strategy.enum.ts. Interfaces at interfaces/document-generator-options.interface.ts, interfaces/generation-result.interface.ts.
Import Organization: 8-group import order: Libraries → DTOs → Services → Repositories → Entities → Interfaces → Enums → Events.

Default Values: Default cache TTL: 3600000ms (1 hour). Default cache strategy: TEMPLATE_HASH. Default ACL: public-read. S3 filename auto-generation: UUID + extension (.pdf or .xlsx). Content-Type auto-detection: application/pdf (PDF), application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet (Excel).

Logging: Structured logging format (Epic 7 pattern). JSON format: { timestamp, level, message, context: { module, method, ... } }. Log generation time, cache hit/miss, file size, S3 upload success/failure.
Testing: Arrange-Act-Assert pattern. Mock dependencies (CacheService, RetryService, AwsService, Factories). Unit tests for generate() method scenarios. Integration tests for full generation flow.

interface.name: DocumentGeneratorService.generate()
interface.signature: async generate(documentType: DocumentType, options: DocumentGeneratorOptions): Promise<GenerationResult>

interface.name: DocumentGeneratorOptions
interface.signature: { templateName: string, data: any, lang: string, s3Options: { path: string, filename?: string, contentType?: string, acl?: 'private' | 'public-read' | 'public-read-write' }, cacheStrategy?: CacheStrategy, cacheTtl?: number, metadata?: any }

interface.name: GenerationResult
interface.signature: { success: boolean, fileUrl: string, cached: boolean, generatedAt: Date, fileSize?: number, generationTime?: number, metadata?: any }

interface.name: S3Service.uploadFile()
interface.signature: async uploadFile(buffer: Buffer, key: string, mimeType: string): Promise<string>

interface.name: RetryService.executeWithRetry()
interface.signature: async executeWithRetry<T>(operation: () => Promise<T>, context: string): Promise<T>

tests.standards: Unit tests use Arrange-Act-Assert pattern. Mock dependencies (CacheService, RetryService, AwsService, Factories). Integration tests verify full generation flow. E2E tests cover cache hit/miss scenarios and error handling. Test coverage target: 70%+. Testing framework: Jest v29.x. Mocking: Jest mocks for Puppeteer, ExcelJS, AwsService, CacheManager.
tests.locations: Unit tests: src/modules/document-generator/services/__tests__/document-generator.service.spec.ts Integration tests: src/modules/document-generator/services/__tests__/document-generator.service.integration-spec.ts E2E tests: test/document-generator.e2e-spec.ts

ideas.test: Unit test: DocumentGeneratorService constructor with all dependencies injected
Unit test: generate() method signature validation
Integration test: Full generation flow (cache miss → adapter → S3 upload → cache update)
Unit test: Cache hit scenario - returns cached S3 URL
Unit test: PDF generation - PdfAdapterFactory.getAdapter() called
Unit test: Excel generation - ExcelAdapterFactory.getAdapter() called
Unit test: DocumentType enum values (PDF, EXCEL)
Unit test: CacheStrategy enum values (TEMPLATE_HASH, NO_CACHE)
Unit test: DocumentGeneratorOptions interface validation
Unit test: GenerationResult interface validation
Unit test: AdapterNotFoundException thrown when adapter not found
Unit test: TemplateNotFoundException caught and re-thrown
Unit test: GenerationFailedException thrown on generation failure
Unit test: GenerationFailedException thrown on S3 upload failure after retries
Unit test: Default cache TTL: 3600000ms
Unit test: Default cache strategy: TEMPLATE_HASH
Unit test: Default ACL: public-read
Unit test: S3 filename auto-generation: UUID + extension
Unit test: Content-Type auto-detection: application/pdf (PDF)
Unit test: Content-Type auto-detection: application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet (Excel)
Unit test: Generation time logging
Unit test: Cache hit/miss logging
Unit test: File size logging
Unit test: S3 upload success/failure logging
Unit test: Structured logging format (JSON)
